case_title: MICHAEL CONEFF VS. STEVEN CLARK KRAL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONEFF, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT KRAL, STEVEN CLARK DBA ESTATE MAINTENANCE SERVICES AKA E.M.S. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
